docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2018 BY PRO TEM PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY PALACIO, RECOVERY REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RHONDA ALEXANDER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR LOANTOPIA LLC ASSIGNED TO SMITH, PHIL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $923.99 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, RHONDA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LOANTOPIA LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, RHONDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE SMITH, PHIL AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, RHONDA

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,774.68 [JUDGMENT DEFICIT OF $2.26 WELL BELOW THE $10.00 ALLOWABLE THRESHOLD] AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, RHONDA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOANTOPIA LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, RHONDA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $95.00 SERVED DEC-05-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, RHONDA
